title: Magnetic & Non-Magnetic Materials Sorter
instructions_for_student: Drag each object card into the Magnetic or Non-Magnetic bin. Remember: only iron, nickel, and cobalt are magnetic materials.

additionalProps.title: Magnetic & Non-Magnetic Materials
additionalProps.subtitle: Chapter 4 – Exploring Magnets
additionalProps.instructionText: Drag each object card into the Magnetic or Non-Magnetic bin. Remember: only iron, nickel, and cobalt are magnetic materials.

cards.label: Steel Spoon
cards.explanation: Steel contains iron, so it is magnetic.
cards.hint: Steel is an alloy made mostly of iron — iron is magnetic!

cards.label: Copper Wire
cards.explanation: Copper is not attracted to magnets.
cards.hint: Only iron, nickel, and cobalt are magnetic metals.

cards.label: Aluminium Can
cards.hint: Aluminium does not contain iron, nickel, or cobalt.

cards.label: Iron Nail
cards.explanation: Iron is one of the three magnetic metals.
cards.hint: Think: which metals are attracted to magnets? Iron is one!

cards.label: Wooden Block
cards.hint: Only certain metals are magnetic — wood is not a metal.

cards.label: Glass Bottle
cards.hint: Glass contains no iron, nickel, or cobalt.

cards.label: Nickel Ring
cards.explanation: Nickel is one of the three magnetic metals.
cards.hint: Nickel, iron, and cobalt are the magnetic metals!

cards.label: Plastic Cup
cards.hint: Plastic has no metallic content — it is non-magnetic.

schema.description: JSON schema for the Magnetic Sorting Tool

cards.description: Array of object cards to sort. Each item must have: id, label, emoji, correctBin, explanation, hint.

id.description: Unique ID — also controls which SVG illustration is shown. Supported: spoon, wire, can, nail, wood, bottle, nickel, cup

correctBin.description: Which bin this card belongs to

explanation.description: One-line fact shown when correctly placed

hint.description: Short hint shown when incorrectly placed before bouncing back

quick_reference.purpose: Interactive drag-and-drop / tap-to-sort activity for magnetic vs non-magnetic materials
key_features: 8 draggable object cards with inline SVG illustrations (no external assets)
Correct placements lock in green with a one-line science explanation
Wrong placements shake the bin and bounce the card back with a hint
Mobile: tap-to-select + tap-to-place flow (no dragging needed)
Bins shown ABOVE the card pool so they're always visible
Score screen on completion: per-card breakdown with correct/wrong indicators
Progress bar tracks correct placements in real time
Fully responsive — auto-fill grid adapts from 1 to 4+ columns

customisation_examples.name: Reduced set — only 4 objects for younger learners

cards.label: Iron Nail
cards.hint: Iron is one of the magnetic metals.

cards.label: Wooden Block
cards.hint: Only iron, nickel, and cobalt are magnetic.

cards.label: Nickel Ring
cards.hint: Nickel, iron, and cobalt are magnetic.
